name: customer_name_present
expression: customer_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(customer_name)) > 0
description: Customer name is required for KYC onboarding and screening.

name: customer_type_valid_enum
description: Customer type must be a supported onboarding category.

name: risk_rating_valid_enum
expression: risk_rating IS NULL OR risk_rating IN ('Low', 'Medium', 'High')
description: Risk rating should use the expected CDD categories.

name: beneficial_owner_percent_range
expression: beneficial_owner_ownership_percent IS NULL OR (beneficial_owner_ownership_percent > 0 AND beneficial_owner_ownership_percent <= 100)
description: Ownership percentage must be within 0-100 when present.

name: review_date_present
description: CDD records should include review or certification date.
